task_snapshots.title: 341-01: SWE-Bench evaluation harness setup
task_snapshots.description: Verify and configure SWE-Bench Lite evaluation infrastructure [subtask of 07a7114366e9]. Ensure benchmarks/swe_bench/run.py is complete, all 4 scenarios (solo-sonnet, solo-opus, bernstein-sonnet, bernstein-mixed) are registered, configuration is correct, and the harness can start a full evaluation run. Complete when: run.py --list-scenarios shows all 4 scenarios and a dry-run validates the setup.
